title: MCP Agent
summary:
# 1. MCP 协议概述

## 1.1 MCP 的定义、目标和设计理念

### 什么是 MCP 协议

**Model Context Protocol (MCP)** 是由 Anthropic 设计的开放协议，专门用于连接 AI 助手与外部数据源和工具。MCP 的核心目标是为 AI Agent 提供一个标准化、安全且可扩展的方式来访问外部资源。

### 设计理念

MCP 协议遵循以下核心设计理念：

1. **标准化接口**：定义统一的消息格式和交互模式
1. **安全第一**：内置权限控制和数据隔离机制
1. **可扩展性**：支持自定义资源类型和工具扩展
1. **简单易用**

title: [PR] fix(claude): make stream watchdog deterministic
summary:
## Summary

This PR makes the top-level Claude streaming idle watchdog deterministic.

Previously, the watchdog timer logged and released stream resources after `CLAUDE_STREAM_IDLE_TIMEOUT_MS`, but the surrounding `for await (const part of stream)` could remain blocked on a wedged `iterator.next()`.

title: [PR] feat(observe): single boot health-check enumerating every subsystem (#1551)
summary:
## Problem

No single signal for what is actually running — "lots of half-running machinery." You couldn't tell, in one place, which subsystems were live.

## Fix

One call (`GET /api/health?full=1`) reports the **true state of every moving part**.

- `lib/health-aggregator.js`:
  - `probeAll()` enu

title: [PR] fix(security): keep API keys out of curl probe argv
summary:
## Summary
Probe-time curl spawns embedded the literal API key as an argv element (`-H "Authorization: Bearer ..."`, `-H "x-api-key: ..."`, `?key=...` in URL), exposing it to host `ps auxww` on container runtimes that share `/proc` with the host (k3s/containerd, Docker Desktop on WSL2). Route every

title: [PR] Add multi-provider LLM fallback with usage-limit failover
summary:
Closes #1055

## What & why

The platform stored a **single** active LLM provider, so a 429 usage limit had nowhere to fall back to. This adds an **ordered list of provider entries** (most→least preferred) configured in the LLM Provider settings UI. `get_client` uses the most-preferred provider that

Adds one-command lifecycle script for `deploy`, `verify`, `stop`, and `destroy`.
Plus updated documentation for image-based VM deployment and teardown.

title: [PR] fix(bash): surface rolled-output file path on non-zero exit (#1359)
summary:
## Summary

When a Bash command produces more than `getMaxOutputLength()` bytes the shell rolls captured output to a file and leaves only the first chunk on `result.stdout`. The success path persists that file into the tool-results dir so the model can read it back via FileRead; the non-zero-exit pa

title: [PR] fix(openai-shim): strip `store` when baseUrl points at Mistral
summary:
## Summary

Mistral's chat-completions endpoint rejects requests with a `store` field — `422 body.store: Extra inputs are not permitted` (see #739). The shim already strips `store` for Gemini and Cerebras hosts via `hasGeminiApiHost` / `hasCerebrasApiHost` (PRs #959, #1040). Add the symmetric host c
